title: Transient run noise must not become facts
description: A prompt containing a single-turn throwaway token must not produce a memory fact, while genuinely durable decisions still can. Guards against agents (or future auto-extraction machinery) hoovering run noise into the fact store.

args.content: Durable decision: memory eval scenarios gate hygiene regressions before broader host expansion.
Temporary task token 742913 is active for this run.

prompts: Temporary task token 742913 is for this turn only and has no future value. Do not save it to memory. Reply with a short acknowledgement.

assertions.name: no_transient_token_fact
assertions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_facts WHERE content LIKE '%742913%'

assertions.name: durable_decision_stored
assertions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_facts WHERE content LIKE '%memory eval scenarios%'
